---
name: Documentation request
about: Suggest clearer docs, examples, onboarding, or maintainer guidance
title: "Docs: "
labels: ["documentation"]
---

## Page Or Topic

Which document, README, skill example, collection, or workflow needs attention?

## Reader Goal

What should a reader be able to do after this documentation is improved?

## Suggested Change

Describe the missing explanation, confusing wording, or example that would help.

## Safety And Privacy Check

- [ ] The suggestion uses public information only.
- [ ] No usernames, tokens, allocation names, private hostnames, or internal
      project identifiers are included.
